projectDescription: Hivra is a video publishing engine that lets content creators upload once and cross-post to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, X, and Threads — with scheduling, engagement, and analytics in one dashboard.
keyFeatures: Cross-post videos to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, X, and Threads from one upload
Bulk upload and schedule multiple videos across all connected platforms
Unified engagement inbox to read and reply to comments across platforms
Cross-platform analytics with CSV export on paid plans
Publishing approvals workflow for teams and agencies (Business plan)
Per-platform caption and thumbnail customization in the Composer
Workspaces to separate brands, clients, or projects
Team collaboration with Owner, Admin, and Member roles
publicApiSurface: Dashboard Overview — publishing pipeline snapshot, integration health
Composer — upload media, set captions/thumbnails per platform, publish or schedule
Library — manage drafts, scheduled posts, approvals, published jobs
Calendar — editorial view of scheduled content across accounts
Engagement — unified inbox to read and reply to comments
Analytics — cross-platform performance metrics, CSV export
Integrations — connect/disconnect YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X, Threads via OAuth
Workspaces — create, switch, and manage separate workspaces
Team Management — invite members, assign roles (Owner/Admin/Member), set publishing approval requirements
Plans — Free, Creator ($15/mo), Business ($30/mo) with add-on workspaces and seats
